published.text:
### Proof strip support copy
Body: Need the full proof library before you decide? Read the complete case studies hub to compare all three documented builds. If the next question is whether the real leak is first-contact booking speed, after-hours calls, or calendar handoff, open the AI appointment setter guide before you commit to a heavier build.

### Link target
- Anchor text: AI appointment setter guide
- URL: /ai-appointment-setter

edits.description: Bounded homepage copy refresh for GEO indexing support, not a redesign.
Uses proof-to-problem framing so the link feels like decision support after case-study review, not generic navigation.
Anchor text stays descriptive and buyer-language-driven rather than CTA-only copy.
Names the exact operational questions behind appointment-setter intent: first-contact booking speed, after-hours calls, and calendar handoff.
Keeps the tone practical and low-hype while adding a clearer editorial homepage path into a still-zero-visibility cluster parent.
